title: Bloodshot ripper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bloodshotripper.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Bloodshot ripper]]
The '''Bloodshot ripper''' was a one-handed, double-edged melee weapon. Fencers who used the Bloodshot ripper without a lifetime of training were unheard of.<ref name="SWG">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>

At some point of time, this infamous weapon was acquired by the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Treun Lorn]] for his personal museum of deadly blades. When a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] ventured into the [[Myyydril Caverns/Legends|Myyydril Caverns]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and killed Lorn and his creation, the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[N-K Necrosis]], in his laboratory in the deepest depths of the caverns, they found this weapon among various other weapons and items.<ref name="SWG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
